patient_profile_summary.present_illness_positive: cough developed a couple of days ago; initially began with runny nose; productive cough with thick yellow sputum, changed from baseline white sputum; sometimes notices shortness of breath but no increase from baseline; chills in feet; fever today to 101; chest pain associated with cough; some wheezing; continued sputum darker than prior; nauseous today; decreased oxygen saturation noted upon return
patient_profile_summary.present_illness_negative: denies pain apart from cough-associated chest pain; denies vomiting; denies diarrhea; denies constipation; denies bright red blood per rectum; denies melena; denies hematochezia; denies dysuria; denies hematuria; denies sick contacts at home
patient_profile_summary.medical_history: Atrial fibrillation on coumadin; COPD with 2 liters home oxygen; CHF with unknown EF; osteoarthritis; right cerebellar infarct found incidentally and never symptomatic; hypertension; history of pulmonary embolus; hospitalization for UTI
patient_profile_summary.medication: lidocaine, omeprazole, valsartan, amlodipine, carbidopa-levodopa, fluticasone, simethicone, potassium chloride, alendronate, dorzolamide-timolol, ipratropium-albuterol, furosemide, warfarin, calcium carbonate

turns.doctor: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
turns.patient: I have atrial fibrillation, COPD, CHF, osteoarthritis, and hypertension. I also had a pulmonary embolus and a UTI.

turns.doctor: Do you live alone or with someone?
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
turns.patient: I don't drink alcohol. I used to smoke, but I quit many years ago. I am a little worried about my cough.

turns.doctor: What medications do you usually take?
turns.patient: I take lidocaine, omeprazole, valsartan, amlodipine, carbidopa-levodopa, fluticasone, simethicone, potassium chloride, alendronate, dorzolamide-timolol, ipratropium-albuterol, furosemide, warfarin, and calcium carbonate. My cough is still there.
A couple of days ago. It started with a runny nose. I'm worried about this cough.
